title: goniopteris calypso
intro: Goniopteris calypso, also known as the Calypso fern, is a species of fern found in the tropical forests of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Goniopteris calypso include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Calypso fern are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or added to salves and creams for topical application.
